fn make_tool_end(tool: &str) -> String {
        serde_json::json!({
            "v": 1,
            "type": "tool_end",
            "session_id": "ses-test",
            "turn": 1,
            "timestamp": "2026-03-25T10:01:45.000000000Z",
            "tool": tool,
            "input": {},
            "output": "ok",
            "truncated": false,
            "success": true,
        })
        .to_string()
    }
